title: Common Armor grants +3 AL while equipped

plan.title: Common Armor grants +3 AL while equipped
plan.summary: Attach Common Armor and verify the equipped creature gains +3 Armor Level.

notes: Pre-place this equip Magic on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
Use the card rules text for expected stat changes.

steps: Put Common Armor in player_1 magic slot.
Attach it to player_1 primary creature.
Verify the while-equipped effect is represented by runtime state/events.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the headless expected-success route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
